headline: Revvity to Hold Earnings Call on Tuesday, August 4, 2026
summary: WALTHAM, Mass., July 08, 2026--Revvity, Inc. (NYSE: RVTY), today announced that it will release its second quarter 2026 financial results prior to market open on Tuesday, August 4, 2026. The Company will host a conference call the same day at 7:30 a.m. ET to discuss these results. Prahlad Singh, president and chief executive officer, and Max Krakowiak, chief financial officer, will host the conference call.
